title: The Environmental Quality Commission Approved the Clean Fuels Program 2024 Rulemaking
content: The Environmental Quality Commission today approved the Clean Fuels Program 2024 rulemaking, which makes changes and updates to both the Clean Fuels Program and the Third Party Verification Programâ€™s rule divisions, along with adopting the OR-GREET 4.0 lifecycle fuel carbon intensity model to replace our current OR-GREET 3.0 model.
author: Analysts Account
